,
  IPaymentService.PaymentServiceDecoratorStack.g.cs:
using System;
using DesignPatterns.Structural;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Extensions;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Provides a decorator stack for global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    public static partial class PaymentServiceDecoratorStack
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Builds the decorator stack.
        /// </summary>
        public static global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService Build(global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService core)
        {
            return new DecoratorStackBuilder<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>().Add<global::TestAssembly.LoggingPaymentDecorator>().Build(core);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds the decorator stack from the service provider.
        /// </summary>
        public static global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService Build(global::System.IServiceProvider serviceProvider, global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService core)
        {
            return new DecoratorStackBuilder<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>().Add(serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<global::TestAssembly.LoggingPaymentDecorator>()).Build(core);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers the registry and all implementations in the DI container.
        /// </summary>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection RegisterDi(global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime implementationLifetime = global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime.Singleton)
        {
            services.TryAdd(new global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor(typeof(global::TestAssembly.LoggingPaymentDecorator), global::TestAssembly.LoggingPaymentDecorator, implementationLifetime));
            return services;
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
